guesses.pointingFact: Low-margin streaming hardware plus ads/distribution, with OS embedded in TVs and external players during the streaming wars.
Sells thin-margin TVs while monetizing the living-room installed base through platform advertising and data.
Fire TV hardware and living-room OS compete for household viewing and ad/distribution economics.
Android TV/Chromecast software in TVs and devices targets the same home-entertainment access-point battle.
tvOS devices and living-room software are another tech platform path into the home, though less ad-hardware driven.

direction.cue: Early-2020 stay-at-home viewing boom and a growing installed base favor converting audience into higher-margin ads despite prior price run-up.
